downloadCopy: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Query Filter Expression Fix 20260517.yap
summary: Employee Family Implant v1 is accepted as the runtime baseline based on cumulative Yeeflow runtime evidence. The latest query-filter package fixed the prior blocking second-family-request quota aggregation failure: a second request for the same applicant and quota cycle counted the first 2500.00 usage row, showed Used Quota Before 2500.00, and recalculated Remaining Quota After to 10000.00. Earlier deep runtime evidence proved submit, HR Review, Finance/Benefits routing, usage creation, approval/release update, and Implant Applications / Family Quota Usage persistence paths.
processDesignFixes: Family Quota Usage is created on submission/start for family applications with UsageStatus = In Progress.
Quota check queries In Progress, Occupied, Approved, and Confirmed usage statuses and aggregates with arraySum.
Family Quota Usage edit nodes model approval confirmation to Approved and rejection release to Released using ApplicationNo + ApplicantEmployeeID + QuotaCycleNumber correlation.
Attachment Requirement Rules is read by Query data and copied into RequiredAttachmentSummary for visible guidance.
HasCustomPackageProduct is readonly/required and auto-derived from ProductSummary/Product Selection preflight logic.
HR Review routes Approved + No directly to persistence and Approved + not No to Finance/Benefits Review, covering Yes, empty, and unexpected values.
Query data filter values that reference workflow variables now use expression-token arrays with showCus false instead of HTML expression-button strings in direct-value mode.

localValidation.ydlListValidation: not_practical_standalone_validator_expects_ydl_shape; child lists covered by app validators

runtimeSmoke.importedAppName: Employee Family Implant Quota Lifecycle Branch Coverage 20260517
notes: Imported the package through the Yeeflow UI.
Home dashboard rendered with request status cards and guidance.
Approval form opened on the New tab.
Requester / Applicant defaulted to Renger from Yeeflow and applicant snapshot fields populated.
Initial quota section rendered with Quota Cycle 2026, Boarding Years 1.00, Annual Quota Amount 15000.00, Remaining Quota After 15000.00, Eligibility Status Eligible, and Quota Exceeded No.
Attachment matrix guidance rendered on the form.

deepRuntime.testedPackage: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Quota Lifecycle Branch Coverage 20260517.yap
deepRuntime.runtimeAppName: Employee & Family Implant Application Management-branch coverage

observations: Requester / Applicant defaulted to Renger from Yeeflow and applicant snapshot values remained stable in HR Review.

Family application with Standard Implant Package calculated row subtotal 2500, Product Selection summary Sum: 2500.00, Total Application Amount 2500.00, Remaining Quota After 12500.00, and Quota Exceeded No.
Submit succeeded and HR Review opened.
Family Quota Usage row was created on submission with Usage Status In Progress.
HR Review approval completed for the non-custom product path.
Implant Applications row was created with readable application number, applicant fields, application type, product summary, and total amount.
Family Quota Usage row was updated to Usage Status Approved with Source Application Status Approved.
caveats: Product Summary is readable but stored as raw JSON text.
Submitted Time and Approved Time appeared blank in the usage-row detail view.

test2SecondFamilyIncludesActiveUsage.expected: A second family quota check for the same applicant and quota cycle should include the first approved usage amount.
test2SecondFamilyIncludesActiveUsage.actual: Focused retest with /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Query Filter Expression Fix 20260517.yap showed the second family request loading Used Quota Before 2500.00 before a new product was selected. After selecting Standard Implant Package for 2500.00 and running Check Family Quota, Remaining Quota After recalculated to 10000.00 and Quota Exceeded stayed No.
test2SecondFamilyIncludesActiveUsage.rootCause: The generated Query Data step filters used frontend HTML expression-button strings as direct values. Yeeflow treated those as literal strings instead of expression operands. The fixed export-backed shape uses expression-token arrays in right with showCus false.

observations: Second family request created a Family Quota Usage row.
Rejecting at HR Review with comment 'Runtime rejection release test' completed successfully.
The matching usage row changed to Usage Status Released, Source Application Status Rejected, with notes 'Family quota occupation released after workflow rejection.'
test3RejectionReleaseBehavior.remainingGap: Released rows exclusion was not separately retested after the query-filter fix, but the query now includes active statuses only and the release path updated rejected usage to Released. Treat as non-blocking unless future testing shows Released rows counted.

observations: The confirmed attachment matrix is visible on the form.
Strict upload blocking remains a documented HR verification fallback.
test4AttachmentRequirementRules.gap: Dynamic list-driven guidance was locally present but not separately proven in runtime; v1 acceptance is based on visible attachment guidance plus HR verification fallback, not strict dynamic upload blocking.

observations: Non-custom Standard Product path approved at HR Review and proceeded to persistence/completion without Finance/Benefits Review.
Custom Implant Package set Includes Custom Package Product to Yes after Refresh Total / Product Summary.
Approving HR Review for the custom package created a Finance/Benefits Review task.
Approving Finance/Benefits Review completed the task and removed it from pending tasks.
test5HrReviewBranchCoverage.gap: Empty/null fallback is modeled and locally inspected but was not forced in runtime UI; Custom Package and non-custom v1 routes passed.

observations: Approved family request created an Implant Applications row.
Family Quota Usage row existed and was updated to Approved for the approved family request.
Rejected family request usage row was updated to Released.
Self custom package route completed through Finance/Benefits Review.
gaps: Product Summary is readable but stored as raw JSON text.
Submitted Time and Approved Time appeared blank in one usage-row detail view.

focusedRuntimeQueryFilterFix.testedPackage: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Query Filter Expression Fix 20260517.yap
focusedRuntimeQueryFilterFix.runtimeAppName: Employee Family Implant Query Filter Expression Fix 20260517
observations: Imported package and opened the approval form.
First family request for Standard Implant Package 2500.00 calculated correctly and submitted successfully.
Second family request for the same Requester / Applicant and Quota Cycle 2026 loaded Used Quota Before 2500.00 before any new product row was selected.

After selecting Standard Implant Package for the second family request and running Check Family Quota, Total Application Amount was 2500.00, Used Quota Before was 2500.00, Remaining Quota After was 10000.00, Quota Exceeded was No, and Quota Usage Status was In Progress.
focusedRuntimeQueryFilterFix.rootCauseFixed: Query Data filter right operands for Applicant Employee ID and Quota Cycle Key now use expression-token arrays with showCus false instead of HTML expression-button strings in direct-value mode.

familyUsageContentListNodes.name: Occupy Family Quota Usage on Submission
Confirm Family Quota Usage on Approval
Release Family Quota Usage on Rejection

knownLimitations: Attachment Requirement Rules dynamic query is locally present and visible guidance is runtime-proven; strict upload blocking remains an HR verification fallback for v1.
The empty/unexpected HasCustomPackageProduct fallback branch is modeled and locally inspected but was not forced through a natural runtime UI path.
High-amount Finance/Benefits routing threshold is not configured as a separate business threshold in v1; v1-proven Finance routing is Custom Package based.
Submitted Time and Approved Time display on the usage-row detail view may remain blank; this does not block the v1 business baseline.

baselineAcceptance.acceptedPackage: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Query Filter Expression Fix 20260517.yap
baselineAcceptance.acceptanceBasis: Cumulative runtime evidence from the process-design package plus the focused query-filter fix package. The query-filter fix package supersedes the earlier quota aggregation blocker without redesigning the already-proven HR/Finance/persistence paths.

runtimeProvenPaths.requesterApplicantDefaultAndChange: pass: Requester / Applicant defaults to Current User, remains editable for proxy submission, and has a change action that reruns applicant snapshot and quota logic.
runtimeProvenPaths.applicantSnapshotReadonly: pass: applicant snapshot fields render readonly; HR/Finance review pages keep requester identity readonly.
runtimeProvenPaths.productSublistLookupAutofill: pass: Standard and Custom products autofilled product name, product type, unit price, quantity, and row subtotal.
runtimeProvenPaths.rowSubtotalAndTotalApplicationAmount: pass: Product Selection summary and Total Application Amount updated correctly, including multi-row totals.
runtimeProvenPaths.familyQuotaCheck: pass: quota check uses Total Application Amount and updates used/remaining/exceeded values.
runtimeProvenPaths.secondRequestIncludesPriorUsage: pass: focused query-filter retest counted the first approved 2500.00 usage row in the second request.
runtimeProvenPaths.overQuotaWarningBlock: pass: over-quota family case showed the expected submit-time warning/block behavior.
runtimeProvenPaths.usageCreationOnSubmission: pass: family requests create Family Quota Usage as In Progress on submission/start.
runtimeProvenPaths.usageApprovalReleaseUpdate: pass: HR approval updated usage to Approved; HR rejection updated matching usage to Released with rejected source status.
runtimeProvenPaths.hrReviewRoute: pass: within-quota/non-custom family request submitted and opened HR Review, then proceeded through the standard approved path.
runtimeProvenPaths.financeBenefitsRoute: pass: Custom Package route opened Finance/Benefits Review after HR approval and completed after Finance approval.
runtimeProvenPaths.implantApplicationsPersistence: pass: approved request created readable Implant Applications row.
runtimeProvenPaths.familyQuotaUsagePersistence: pass: family request created and updated readable Family Quota Usage row.

nonBlockingLimitations: Attachment Requirement Rules dynamic query is locally present and visible guidance is runtime-proven; strict upload blocking remains an HR verification fallback for v1.
The empty/unexpected HasCustomPackageProduct fallback branch is modeled and locally inspected but was not forced through a natural runtime UI path.
High-amount Finance/Benefits routing threshold is not configured as a separate business threshold in v1; v1-proven Finance routing is Custom Package based.
Submitted Time and Approved Time display on the usage-row detail view may remain blank; this does not block the v1 business baseline.
